title: Procter & Gamble India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Procter & Gamble India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Procter & Gamble India has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Raipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Procter & Gamble India:
Procter & Gamble India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Procter & Gamble India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
